pi_items.source: Task description and verifier scripts strictly enforce these synthetically generated values.
Wazuh documentation and external web search confirm that wazuh-csyslogd is the actual daemon responsible for syslog output.

privileged_info_summary: I confirmed that the target_configs list contains synthetically generated internal IPs, ports, and severity levels (10.50.20.100:9514 for Splunk and 10.50.20.101:1514 for Graylog) which exactly match the task description instructions and verifier checks. Furthermore, I verified via Wazuh documentation that wazuh-csyslogd is the real daemon responsible for forwarding syslog events, exactly as claimed by the metadata.
